description:
This Custom Shape Window Hanging Acrylic Ornament could be the perfect hanging window decoration for your home.

Material: Strong and durable 3mm-thick acrylic sheet
Easy to hang: 2 holes for attaching stainless steel chain
Hanging chain length: 7.87 inches (4x4, 5x5) and 15.7 inches (6x6, 8x8, 9x9, 10x10, 12x12)
UV printing and laser cut technology provide high-quality, long-lasting prints and sharp and clean edges.
Thickness: 3mm
Sizes: 4x4, 5x5, 6x6, 8x8, 9x9, 10x10, 12x12 inches
2-sided printing: Artwork is visible from two sides.
Window Hanging Acrylic Ornament comes with a hanging chain and a suction cup to hang on your windshield or car windows.

More than a decoration item, this window hanging ornament is also a perfect gift for friends and families.
